title: leucanthemum atratum subsp. platylepis
intro: Leucanthemum atratum subsp. platylepis is a plant species, also known as the ox-eye daisy, a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum atratum subsp. platylepis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
